creator: rwd.cameron@consultant.com
text:
I saw you require a description of who I am for your documentation... So here you go. 

--------

I am a computer science (Informatics) professional with a over twenty years of experience supporting UNIX-based operating systems, web infrastructure and large scale network deployments. 

Two of my own projects, which are currently in the early development stages are: 
•	A FreeBSD based hypervisor. 
  * I'm intending to be a little like Proxmox. 
•	Integration of the ClamAV anti-virus engine into the OpenZFS filesystem. 
  * A replacement for Solaris's vscand. 

I am confident that my ability to communicate technical aspects to non-technical stakeholders, solve complex problems and manage project timelines for anyone requiring support for FreeBSD installations. 

Contact details:
